caption: The video features a man playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, likely performing for an audience. He is dressed in a white shirt with intricate blue embroidery on the sleeves and a black vest adorned with a red and black design. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a classroom or auditorium environment. The audience, consisting of children and possibly adults, is seated in front of him, attentively watching and listening to his performance. The atmosphere seems calm and focused, with the performer deeply engaged in his music. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event.
